prompt: "Maintain the twins from the reference image, create a realistic live-action video style, candid hidden-camera camerawork from a sports broadcast, set in a giant soccer stadium at night. The twins are sitting in the stands wearing soccer team uniforms, side-by-side and cheering. Both are completely absorbed in the match, with scarves around their necks. The atmosphere is that of enthusiastic supporters with natural smiles and excited expressions. Realistic skin texture illuminated by stadium lighting, surrounded by a large crowd. Cinematic footage that looks like it was captured by a telephoto lens, featuring depth of field, natural motion blur, documentary style, ultra-high definition, photorealistic, and movie quality. Do not include corporate logos or text on uniforms, signage, or TV screens. Essentially, the audience and the twins are facing the same direction. Only the spectator seats need to be shown; the soccer pitch itself does not need to be depicted."
